info.name: IntgraServe-AI - Complete API
info.description: Complete API Collection for IntgraServe-AI Customer Support System with all endpoints including Tickets

item.name: Authentication

request.description: Login with email and password. Returns access token and sets refresh token in cookie.
Send password reset link to email
Reset password using token from email
Refresh access token using refresh token from cookie
Logout and clear refresh token cookie

item.description: Authentication endpoints for login, logout, password reset, and token refresh

item.name: My Profile

request.description: Get current authenticated user's profile
Update current user's email and/or full name
Change current user's password (requires current password)
Get audit logs for current user's actions

item.description: User profile management endpoints (accessible by any authenticated user)

request.description: Get current user's assigned roles

item.name: Tickets - External (No Auth)

body.raw:
{
  "external_customer_id": "CUST-12345",
  "customer_email": "customer@example.com",
  "customer_name": "Ahmed Mohamed",
  "title": "Cannot login to my account",
  "description": "I keep getting 'Invalid credentials' error when trying to login. I have tried resetting my password but the issue persists.",
  "priority": "high"
}

request.description:
Create a support ticket from external system. No authentication required.

SLA Times:
- urgent: 1 hour
- high: 4 hours
- medium: 12 hours
- low: 24 hours

formdata.value: I tried clearing the cache but still having the same issue. Please see attached screenshot.

request.description:
Add message from external customer with optional file attachments.

Options:
- Message only
- Files only (auto-generates "[File(s) attached]")
- Message + Files

File Rules:
- Max 5 files
- Max 10 MB per file
- Allowed: jpg, jpeg, png, gif, pdf, doc, docx, txt, csv, xlsx

exec: console.log("✅ First ticket ID saved:", jsonData.tickets[0].id);

request.description: Get all tickets for external customer by email. Returns simplified information.
Get messages for external customer. Internal notes are automatically excluded.

item.description: External/Public ticket endpoints - No authentication required

item.name: Tickets - Authenticated

exec: console.log("✅ First ticket ID saved:", jsonData.tickets[0].id);

query.description: Filter: open, in_progress, pending, escalated, resolved, closed, canceled
Sort: created_at, updated_at, priority, status, title

request.description:
Get tickets assigned to current user. Automatically filters by role:
- Tech User → sees only tech tickets
- Support User → sees only support tickets
- Admin → sees all

exec: console.log("✅ Unassigned ticket ID saved:", jsonData.tickets[0].id);

request.description: Get unassigned tickets available for pickup. Filters by role automatically.
Get detailed information about a specific ticket
Self-assign an unassigned ticket. Ticket must be OPEN and match your role type. Status automatically changes to IN_PROGRESS.

Update ticket status.

Valid transitions:
- open → in_progress, canceled
- in_progress → pending, resolved, escalated, canceled
- pending → in_progress, resolved, canceled
- escalated → in_progress, resolved, canceled
- resolved → closed, open
- closed → open

Toggle ticket between Tech and Support teams.

- SUPPORT → TECH (unassigned)
- TECH → SUPPORT (unassigned)

Cannot reassign closed, canceled, or resolved tickets.
Mark ticket as resolved with resolution notes (min 10 chars, max 2000 chars).

Cancel a ticket (e.g., duplicate, spam, invalid request).

Cancellation reason: min 5 chars, max 500 chars
Close a ticket (final state). Can only close RESOLVED tickets.
Get all messages for a ticket including internal notes (visible to authenticated users only).

formdata.value: I have checked the logs and found the issue. Working on a fix.

formdata.description: If true, not visible to customer

request.description:
Add message or internal note to ticket with optional file attachments.

Options:
- Message only
- Files only (auto-generates "[File(s) attached]")
- Message + Files

File Rules:
- Max 5 files
- Max 10 MB per file
- Allowed: jpg, jpeg, png, gif, pdf, doc, docx, txt, csv, xlsx

formdata.value: Checked database - user account is locked due to failed login attempts. Need to unlock.

formdata.description: Internal notes are NOT visible to customers

request.description: Add an internal note (not visible to customers).

Sort: created_at, updated_at, priority, status, title, customer_name
Search in title, customer name/email, external_id

request.description: Get all tickets with comprehensive filtering options (Admin only)
Get complete ticket information with ALL fields including resolution notes, cancellation reasons, escalation details, and previous assignee (Admin only)
Delete ticket (soft delete - sets is_active to false). Admin only.
Get comprehensive ticket statistics (Admin only)
Create new user (Admin only)

query.description: Search in email and full name

Get comprehensive user statistics (Admin only)

request.description: Get user activity (last login information) (Admin only)
Get user details by ID (Admin only)
Update user email and full name (Admin only)
Update user password (Admin only)
Update user roles (Admin only)
Activate multiple users at once (max 100) (Admin only)
Deactivate multiple users at once (max 100) (Admin only)
Get audit logs for actions performed BY a specific user (Admin only)

Get role statistics with user counts (Admin only)
